title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE
innovation_summary: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE: We propose Jet-Long, a tuning-free zero-shot method that pairs a local RoPE-faithful window with a long-range window whose rescaling factor adapts dynamically to the current sequence.
